model_context.series_context: Eastern Conference Semifinals, Knicks lead 2-0 after Game 2

game.venue: Madison Square Garden, New York, NY

source_notes.official_book: NBA official scorer report uploaded by user: 20260506_PHINYK_book (2).pdf
source_notes.recap: AP recap supplied by user: Jalen Brunson helps Knicks take 2-0 lead over 76ers with 108-102 victory.
source_notes.injury_context: Joel Embiid ruled out with sprained right ankle and sore right hip; Mitchell Robinson DND due to illness.

market_positions.selection: No - New York wins by over 4.5 points

turning_points: Philadelphia led 90-89 entering the 4th quarter, keeping the live +4.5 equivalent highly live.
Philadelphia went up 99-96 on Kelly Oubre Jr.'s 3-pointer with 6:52 left.
Josh Hart immediately tied the game with a 3-pointer at 6:25, stabilizing New York's late-game possession quality.
Jalen Brunson created the final leverage swing with buckets at 5:06 and 3:46, moving New York from 99-99 to 103-99.
Mikal Bridges extended the margin to 105-99 at 2:56, moving the ticket outside the +4.5 cover band.
Philadelphia scored only 12 points in the 4th quarter on 4-of-19 shooting and 1-of-10 from three.

Jalen Brunson.model_relevance: Late-game closer; hit the tiebreaking shot and another midrange jumper to push NYK beyond the live +4.5 threshold.

Karl-Anthony Towns.model_relevance: Paint pressure and late rebounding anchor. He had 9 fourth-quarter rebounds, blocking PHI's second-chance comeback path.

OG Anunoby.model_relevance: Two-way force and transition pressure source; late injury/locker-room exit should be tracked for Game 3.

Mikal Bridges.model_relevance: Second-half Maxey containment improved; also hit the key 20-foot jumper at 2:56 to create the six-point final margin zone.

Tyrese Maxey.model_relevance: Strong first half with 19 points, but only 7 points in the second half and 5 in the fourth. Fatigue/usage burden without Embiid became a late-game suppressor.

Paul George.model_relevance: Early shot-making supported PHI cover equity, but 0 fourth-quarter points on 0-of-5 shooting hurt the final possession band.

Kelly Oubre Jr..model_relevance: Hit the 6:52 fourth-quarter three to put PHI up 99-96, but PHI offense stalled after.

Adem Bona.model_relevance: Embiid-out rebound funnel emerged; foul trouble capped the ceiling.

live_entry_read.edge_quality: Playable micro-edge due to Embiid-out PHI resilience, close-game lead-change density, and market overreaction to Game 1 blowout.

actual_result_delta.spread_delta_vs_ticket: Missed by 1.5 points; NYK won by 6 vs PHI +4.5 equivalent.
actual_result_delta.model_mean_margin_delta: +3.2 NYK points vs live mean margin.

failure_modes: PHI late-game shot quality was adequate but conversion failed: 4-of-19 FG and 1-of-10 3PT in 4Q.
Maxey workload fatigue appeared after 46:48 minutes; only 7 second-half points with 3 second-half turnovers.
Paul George failed to convert as secondary closer: 0 fourth-quarter points on 0-of-5 shooting.
KAT's fourth-quarter rebounding control removed PHI's extra possession path.
Brunson late-game shot-making exceeded the expected close-game spread band.
what_model_got_right: Correctly downgraded the weight of Game 1 blowout due to Philadelphia fatigue/rest disadvantage.
Correctly identified PHI would compete without Embiid rather than repeat a 25+ point loss profile.
Correctly projected close-game volatility: 25 lead changes and neither team led by more than seven.
Correctly identified live +4.5 equivalent as the best available position versus laying NYK live chalk.
patch_recommendations: Add CLOSING_SHOTMAKING_SUPPRESSOR for Embiid-out PHI when Maxey exceeds 44 minutes and George is cold entering final 6 minutes.
Upgrade KAT_LATE_REBOUND_STABILIZER when Mitchell Robinson is out and Knicks need defensive closeout possessions.
Add BRUNSON_CLOSE_GAME_MARGIN_EXPANSION gate for live spreads inside 5 points during playoff 4Q windows.
Keep Game1_Blowout_Deweighting active, but require late-game closer scoring projection before attacking short underdog live spreads.

betting_result_summary.notes: LiveFlow micro-position on PHI +4.5 equivalent lost by 1.5 points. Read was structurally sound, but late NYK clutch execution plus PHI fourth-quarter shot drought broke the cover band.
